name: Abyss Warrior
desc: Once per turn: You can discard 1 WATER monster to the Graveyard, then target 1 monster in either player's Graveyard; return that target to either the top or bottom of the Deck.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can discard 1 WATER monster to the Graveyard, then target 1 monster in either player's Graveyard; return that target to either the top or bottom of the Deck.
eff: Once per turn: You can discard 1 WATER monster to the Graveyard, then target 1 monster in either player's Graveyard; return that target to either the top or bottom of the Deck.

action: Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
